channel.title: GitHub Trending - Nuovi in Swift (Monthly)
channel.description: Repository (Nuovi) più popolari in Swift nel periodo monthly.

item.title: 📝 NoopApp/noop (1724 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: NoopApp

📝 Repository: NoopApp/noop

📄 Descrizione: Offline WHOOP companion — pair your strap over Bluetooth, keep all data on your own device. No cloud, no account, no subscription.

⭐ Stelle: 1724

🍴 Forks: 733

💻 Linguaggio: Swift

📜 Licenza: Other

⏰ Creato il: 2026-06-07T17:03:02Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-06-17T06:59:49Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: 📝 EEliberto/IPA-Download (1077 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: EEliberto

📝 Repository: EEliberto/IPA-Download

📄 Descrizione: 一款用于安装 IPA 历史版本的工具，适用于获取旧版应用并自动捕获数据包。下载后，可直接通过 AirDrop 传输至 iPhone、iPad 上并安装并使用。

⭐ Stelle: 1077

🍴 Forks: 57

💻 Linguaggio: Swift

📜 Licenza: Apache License 2.0

⏰ Creato il: 2026-06-13T08:32:39Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-06-19T05:53:57Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: 📝 caezium/Burrow (717 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: caezium

📝 Repository: caezium/Burrow

📄 Descrizione: 🐹 A free, open-source, native macOS GUI for the Mole CLI (mo): clean, uninstall, optimize, analyze disk, and watch live status. Plus long-range history + an MCP server for AI agents.

⭐ Stelle: 717

🍴 Forks: 139

💻 Linguaggio: Swift

🏷️ Topics: cleaner disk-usage macos mcp menubar mole open-source swift swiftui system-monitor

📜 Licenza: MIT License

⏰ Creato il: 2026-05-31T08:37:49Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-06-19T04:09:54Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: 📝 vorssaint/vorssaint-utils (687 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: vorssaint

📝 Repository: vorssaint/vorssaint-utils

📄 Descrizione: Free open-source macOS menu bar toolkit. Per-app volume mixer, system monitor, keep awake, window switcher (Alt Tab), shelf, app uninstaller, and much more.

⭐ Stelle: 687

🍴 Forks: 38

💻 Linguaggio: Swift

🏷️ Topics: alt-tab app-uninstaller appkit finder free keep-awake mac-os menu-bar menubar open-source swift swift-ui system-monitor uninstaller volume-mixer window-switcher

📜 Licenza: GNU General Public License v3.0

⏰ Creato il: 2026-06-12T15:25:43Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-06-19T06:57:52Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: 📝 iliyami/MacSai (657 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: iliyami

📝 Repository: iliyami/MacSai

📄 Descrizione: Mac Sai: the open-source Mac cleaner, optimizer, and malware scanner. A free, Apple-notarized alternative to CleanMyMac, built with Swift 6 and SwiftUI.

⭐ Stelle: 657

🍴 Forks: 43

💻 Linguaggio: Swift

🏷️ Topics: appkit cleanmymac cleanmymac-alternative darwin disk-cleaner duplicate-finder homebrew-cask mac-cleaner mac-utility macos macos-app malware-scanner no-subscription open-source privacy swift swift6 swiftui system-cleaner uninstaller

📜 Licenza: BSD 3-Clause "New" or "Revised" License

⏰ Creato il: 2026-05-27T04:07:33Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-06-19T06:30:20Z

item.description:
👤 Owner: thebriangao

📝 Repository: thebriangao/pebble

📄 Descrizione: The open-source alternative to Minecraft: Java Edition, a complete block-survival game in ~45,000 lines of Swift + Metal. Zero dependencies, fully deterministic, singleplayer for now. Not affiliated with Mojang or Microsoft. We lowkey need y'all to submit bug reports cuz there are so many 😭

item.title: 📝 davidhoo/MarkdownReader (98 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: davidhoo

📝 Repository: davidhoo/MarkdownReader

📄 Descrizione: A quiet native macOS Markdown reader built with SwiftUI, cmark-gfm & WKWebView. Three-column layout with file tree, rendered markdown, and outline navigation. Mermaid, KaTeX, PlantUML, Prism.js, 33 themes, i18n, PDF export, and more.

⭐ Stelle: 98

🍴 Forks: 6

💻 Linguaggio: Swift

🏷️ Topics: cmark-gfm katex macos markdown markdown-reader mermaid native-app pdf-export prismjs swift swiftui theme-system wkwebview

📜 Licenza: No license

⏰ Creato il: 2026-06-01T02:48:28Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-06-13T22:25:15Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>
